name: Queue Consumers & React Dashboard
description: Implemented queue message consumers for browser automation, media processing, and social content generation. Fixed TypeScript issues and initialized React dashboard components.

items: tiktok.ts - TikTok script, hooks, hashtag generation
pinterest.ts integration with TikTok error handling
Added MEDIA bucket to Env interface
Removed duplicate files with casing issues

key_patterns.queue_consumer: Batch handlers with message.ack() / message.retry() for Cloudflare Queues
key_patterns.error_handling: LogDispatch to D1 for audit trail on all queue operations
key_patterns.session_management: KV storage for eBay session tokens with TTL expiration
key_patterns.content_generation: AI-powered scripts, hashtags, hooks based on EnrichedDraft

planned_work: Frontend dashboard implementation (charts, listings grid, activity feed)
Real-time WebSocket sync between DO and React components
notes: All queue handlers follow the same pattern: batch processing with DB logging
Social content generation uses AI to create platform-optimized copy
Browser automation stubs ready for integration with Browserbase/Browserless
MediaQueue operations are foundation for image optimization with Workers AI
